content: Better Auth 1.6.20 hooks API: after/before hooks using createAuthMiddleware. ctx object provides: ctx.path (endpoint path string), ctx.headers (Headers object, use ctx.headers.get('x-forwarded-for'), ctx.headers.get('user-agent')), ctx.body (POST body), ctx.request, ctx.query, ctx.context.newSession (after hooks only - has user and session data). Known path strings: /sign-in/email, /sign-up/email, /sign-out, /change-password, /reset-password, /change-email, /update-user, /sign-in/social. For audit: after hook with ctx.runInBackground() for fire-and-forget. IP: ctx.headers.get('x-forwarded-for'). Also: betterAuth advanced.ipAddress.ipAddressHeaders config can list custom headers. User agent: ctx.headers.get('user-agent'). ctx.context.newSession.user has userId after sign-in.
